plugin.name: MatronReporter
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Times Matron Dragon runs and reports rewards

trigger.match: You stumble forward and find yourself in a large, very angry dragon's lair!
^You manage to loot a \w+ Trivia Point Token from the lair\.$
You manage to grab some loot before escaping the collapsing lair.

muclient.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Colour tables matching SKDReport theme --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local MUSH_COLOR = { white = "white", cyan = "#00D7FF", yellow = "#875FFF", red = "#00FF87", } local AARD_COLOR = { white = "@W", cyan = "@x045", yellow = "@x099", red = "@x048", }
local function BuildLine(segments) local parts, plain, aard = {}, {}, {} for _, seg in ipairs(segments) do table.insert(parts, MUSH_COLOR[seg[1]] or seg[1]) table.insert(parts, "") table.insert(parts, seg[2]) table.insert(plain, seg[2]) table.insert(aard, (AARD_COLOR[seg[1]] or "@W") .. seg[2]) end return parts, table.concat(plain), table.concat(aard) .. "@w" end
local ANOTE_MAP = { ["@x045"] = "#00D7FF", ["@x099"] = "#875FFF", ["@x048"] = "#00FF87", ["@W"] = "white", ["@w"] = "silver", } local function ANote(msg) local args = {} local pos = 1 while pos <= #msg do local code, rest = msg:match("^(@[xX]%d%d%d)(.*)", pos) if not code then code, rest = msg:match("^(@[Ww])(.*)", pos) end if code then local col = ANOTE_MAP[code] or "white" local text = rest:match("^([^@]*)") or "" table.insert(args, col) ; table.insert(args, "") ; table.insert(args, text) pos = pos + #code + #text else local text = msg:match("^([^@]+)", pos) or msg:sub(pos, pos) table.insert(args, "white") ; table.insert(args, "") ; table.insert(args, text) pos = pos + #text end end if #args > 0 then ColourNote(unpack(args)) end end
local COL_HDR = "@x045" local COL_VAL = "@W" local COL_ACC = "@x045" local COL_TIME = "@x048" local COL_SEP = "@x099" local COL_GOOD = "@x048" local COL_LBL = "@W" local COL_ITEM = "@x099"
local SEP = COL_SEP .. string.rep("-", 60) .. "@w"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Known reward types for per-run % tracking -- Each run record stores which of these appeared (0 or 1 per run) --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local REWARD_KEYS = { "TP Token", "Mirage of an Oasis", "Sunburst Shield", "Quest Points", "Training Sessions", }
-- Plugin state local runActive = false local startTime = 0 local elapsed = 0 local finalizeGen = 0 local pendingGen = 0 local pendingLoots = {}
local CHAN_KEY = "matron_report_channel" local DATA_FILE = GetInfo(66) .. "matron_runs.txt"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Persistence --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function LoadRuns() local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "r") if not f then return {} end local raw = f:read("*all") f:close() if not raw or raw == "" then return {} end local fn, err = loadstring("return " .. raw) if not fn then ColourNote("white", "", "[MatronReporter] LoadRuns parse error: " .. tostring(err)) return {} end local ok, t = pcall(fn) if not ok or type(t) ~= "table" then ColourNote("white", "", "[MatronReporter] LoadRuns exec error: " .. tostring(t)) return {} end return t end
local function SaveRuns(runs) local entries = {} for _, r in ipairs(runs) do local lparts = {} for _, loot in ipairs(r.loots) do lparts[#lparts+1] = string.format("%q", loot) end entries[#entries+1] = string.format("{secs=%d,loots={%s}}", r.secs, table.concat(lparts, ",")) end local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "w") if not f then ColourNote("white", "", "[MatronReporter] ERROR: Could not write to " .. DATA_FILE) return end f:write("{" .. table.concat(entries, ",") .. "}") f:close() end
-- Normalize a raw loot string to one of the REWARD_KEYS categories local function NormalizeReward(loot) if loot == "TP Token" then return "TP Token" end if loot == "Mirage of an Oasis" then return "Mirage of an Oasis" end if loot == "Sunburst Shield" then return "Sunburst Shield" end if loot:match("Quest Points$") then return "Quest Points" end if loot:match("Training Sessions$") then return "Training Sessions" end return loot -- unknown item, keep as-is end
-- Derive stats: per-run presence counts for each reward type local function CalcTotals(runs) local totalSecs = 0 -- presence[key] = number of runs where this reward appeared at least once local presence = {} for _, key in ipairs(REWARD_KEYS) do presence[key] = 0 end
for _, r in ipairs(runs) do totalSecs = totalSecs + r.secs local seen = {} for _, loot in ipairs(r.loots) do local key = NormalizeReward(loot) if not seen[key] then seen[key] = true presence[key] = (presence[key] or 0) + 1 end end end return { runs=#runs, totalSecs=totalSecs, presence=presence } end
local function GetChannel() return GetVariable(CHAN_KEY) or "gt" end
local function FmtTime(secs) local m = math.floor(secs / 60) local s = secs % 60 if m > 0 then return string.format("%dm %02ds", m, s) else return string.format("%ds", s) end end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Finalize --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function MatronFinalizeCallback() if runActive and finalizeGen == pendingGen then FinalizeRun() end end
local function ArmFinalize() pendingGen = finalizeGen DoAfterSpecial(1.5, "MatronFinalizeCallback()", 12) end
function FinalizeRun() runActive = false
local runs = LoadRuns() runs[#runs+1] = { secs=elapsed, loots=pendingLoots } SaveRuns(runs) local stats = CalcTotals(runs) local runNum = #runs
_G._matron_last = { elapsed=elapsed, loots=pendingLoots, runNum=runNum }
local segs = { {"cyan", "Matron"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(elapsed)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Loot"}, {"white", ": "}, } for i, r in ipairs(pendingLoots) do if i > 1 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", ", "} end segs[#segs+1] = {"red", r} end segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(GetChannel() .. " " .. aard) end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Trigger callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function RunStart() runActive = true startTime = os.time() pendingLoots = {} finalizeGen = finalizeGen + 1 elapsed = 0 ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Matron] " .. COL_LBL .. "Run timer started.") end
function RunSnapshot() if not runActive then return end elapsed = os.time() - startTime end
function LootGlassToken() if not runActive then return end pendingLoots[#pendingLoots+1] = "TP Token" ArmFinalize() end
function LootNamedItem(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end local item = wildcards[1] if item and item ~= "" then pendingLoots[#pendingLoots+1] = item ArmFinalize() end end
function LootQuestPoints(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end if wildcards[1] then pendingLoots[#pendingLoots+1] = wildcards[1] .. " Quest Points" ArmFinalize() end end
function LootTrainingSessions(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end if wildcards[1] then pendingLoots[#pendingLoots+1] = wildcards[1] .. " Training Sessions" ArmFinalize() end end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Alias callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function DumpRuns() ColourNote("#00D7FF", "", "[MatronReporter] Data file: " .. DATA_FILE) local runs = LoadRuns() ColourNote("#00D7FF", "", "[MatronReporter] Loaded " .. #runs .. " runs.") for i, r in ipairs(runs) do ColourNote("#00FF87", "", " Run " .. i .. ": secs=" .. tostring(r.secs) .. " loots=" .. table.concat(r.loots or {}, ", ")) end end
-- Manually inject a run: matronreportinject <secs> <loot1>|<loot2>|... -- Example: matronreportinject 130 26 Quest Points|Mirage of an Oasis function InjectRun(name, line, wildcards) local secs = tonumber(wildcards[1]) local lootstr = wildcards[2] if not secs or not lootstr then ColourNote("white", "", "[MatronReporter] Usage: matronreportinject <secs> <loot1>|<loot2>|...") return end local loots = {} for item in lootstr:gmatch("([^|]+)") do loots[#loots+1] = item:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") -- trim whitespace end local runs = LoadRuns() runs[#runs+1] = { secs=secs, loots=loots } SaveRuns(runs) ColourNote("#00FF87", "", "[MatronReporter] Injected run #" .. #runs .. ": " .. secs .. "s | " .. table.concat(loots, ", ")) end
function SetReportChannel(name, line, wildcards) local chan = wildcards[1]:lower() SetVariable(CHAN_KEY, chan) ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Matron] " .. COL_LBL .. "Report channel set to: " .. COL_VAL .. chan) end
function SendReport(name, line, wildcards) local chan = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel() local last = _G._matron_last if not last then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Matron] " .. COL_LBL .. "No completed run to report yet.") return end
local segs = { {"cyan", "Matron"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(last.runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(last.elapsed)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Loot"}, {"white", ": "}, } for i, r in ipairs(last.loots) do if i > 1 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", ", "} end segs[#segs+1] = {"red", r} end segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowLifetimeStats(name, line, wildcards) local runs = LoadRuns() local stats = CalcTotals(runs) if stats.runs == 0 then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[Matron] " .. COL_LBL .. "No runs recorded yet.") return end
local chan = (wildcards and wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel() local avgSecs = math.floor(stats.totalSecs / stats.runs)
local segs = { {"cyan", "Matron Life"}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Runs"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.runs)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Avg"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(avgSecs)}, {"white", "]"}, } for _, key in ipairs(REWARD_KEYS) do local cnt = stats.presence[key] or 0 local pct = string.format("%.0f", cnt / stats.runs * 100) segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", key} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", ": "} segs[#segs+1] = {"red", pct .. "%"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowHelp() ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_HDR .. " -=- MATRON REPORTER HELP -=-") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "matronreportchan <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Set default report channel (e.g. gt, clan, spo)") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "matronreport <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Resend last run report to <channel>") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "matronreportlife <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Send lifetime stats to <channel>") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "matronreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " - Show this help") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " Timer starts on entering the lair, snaps on escape line.") ANote(COL_LBL .. " Report auto-sends to channel on run complete.") ANote(SEP) end
function OnPluginInstall() ANote(COL_HDR .. "[MatronReporter] " .. COL_LBL .. "Loaded. Type " .. COL_ACC .. "matronreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " for commands.") end
function OnPluginEnable() OnPluginInstall() end
